subject: Northwind this week: your first 100 customers
preview: The season we stopped chasing reach and started remembering names, plus the finale blog and podcast.
html:
Northwind Bakehouse

The week in five minutes

This week we told an uncomfortable story: for one exhausting quarter we chased scale, flooded the feed, and nearly closed the doors. Then we stopped optimizing for reach and started remembering names, and the ovens got busy again.

If you only read one thing:

Why your first 100 customers matter more than your next 10,000
The finale essay, free to read. No pitch until the last line.
Listen: Names Beat Numbers (11 min)
The quiet Tuesday that changed how we count a good week.

The rest of the series, day by day, lives on our page. Swipe back through it when you have a slow morning and a warm cup.

You are getting this because a hundred people once felt seen here and did the marketing we could never afford. Thank you for being one of them.

Come by this week · Unsubscribe
